news.title: Global Market: Euro Zone firms see slower price and wage growth, ECB survey shows

news.title: Global Market: German bond yields hit two-year high as oil surge fuels ECB rate hike bets
news.description: German bond yields rose as oil prices increased amid U.S.-Iran tensions. This surge strengthened expectations for the European Central Bank to tighten monetary policy. news.title: Global Market: European shares dip as oil surge fuels inflation fears ahead of ECB meeting
news.description: European shares dipped slightly as oil prices climbed due to escalating US-Iran tensions. news.title: India 10-year bond slumps to lowest in nearly a month as Middle East oil risks heat up
news.description: Indian government bonds experienced a significant decline early Monday.  Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions pushed oil prices higher, impacting the rupee. news.title: Why we cannot abandon GDP and what the world can do to improve its utility as a statistical gauge
news.description: Gross domestic product (GDP) has been long criticized for its inadequacy in measuring economic activity or welfare. True, it is imperfect. But it is too deeply embedded in the institutional architecture of governments, markets and global organizations to drop.

news.title: Scott Bessent: US to control 80% of global compute power soon
news.description:

news.title: How the U.S. Constitution was designed with respect for ‘a degree of depravity in mankind’
